message.content:
@startuml
title Omit Representation

actor Client

rectangle "Representation" as Rep1
rectangle "Representation" as Rep2

note right of Client: Header Value\nPrefer return=minimal
note left of Client: Header Value\nPreference-Applied return=minimal

Client --> Rep1 : PUT / POST / PATCH
Rep1 --> Client : 204 No Content / 201 Created

Client --> Rep2

@enduml
